products.name: B45 Traditional/CW Thru-hull
products.descriptor: Dual-frequency 50/200 kHz 600 W bronze thru-hull depth/temperature transducer

evidence.snippet:
B45 Traditional/CW Thru-hull
----------------------------
Part NumberB45

**600 W**
The B45 is Airmar’s smallest and most economical, dual-frequency, bronze, stem transducer. It features a single, 50/200 kHz ceramic element. The included fairing streamlines the transducer and increases the performance—even at higher speeds.

evidence.snippet:
B60 Traditional/CW Tilted Element™ Thru-hull

products.name: M42 Commercial Fishing/Survey Transducer
products.descriptor: Patented 38 kHz external-mount 2.2 kW transducer for commercial fishing and survey

evidence.snippet:
M42 Commercial Fishing/Survey Transducer
----------------------------------------
Part NumberM42

The patented M42 is a large, external-mount housing which accommodates 24 ceramics resonating at 38 kHz. The narrow-beam, low-ringing, 38 kHz array allows fisherman to see bottom structure clearly and to easily discriminate between bottom structure and target fish.
Country of Origin: USA

products.name: P19 Traditional/CW Tilted Element™ Thru-hull
products.descriptor: 250 W single-frequency tilted-element plastic thru-hull depth/temperature transducer

evidence.snippet:
P19 Traditional/CW Tilted Element™ Thru-hull
--------------------------------------------
Part NumberP19

*   Depth only or depth and fast-response water-temperature sensing
*   250 W of power for depth performance to 206 m (700')
*   200 kHz frequency with a 14° beamwidth

products.name: P39 Smart™ TRIDUCER® Multisensor Transom Mount
products.descriptor: 235 kHz NMEA 2000/0183 transom-mount depth/speed/temperature Smart sensor

evidence.snippet:
P39 Smart™ TRIDUCER® Multisensor Transom Mount
----------------------------------------------
Part NumberP39

*   Depth, speed, and fast-response water-temperature sensing
*   \* 60 W of power for NMEA 0183, and 100 W for NMEA 2000 protocol
*   235 kHz frequency prevents mutual interference with other echo sounders on the vessel

products.name: P58 TRIDUCER® Multisensor/CW Transom Mount
products.descriptor: Dual-frequency 50/200 kHz 600 W transom-mount depth/speed/temperature multisensor

evidence.snippet:
P58 TRIDUCER® Multisensor/CW Transom Mount
------------------------------------------
Part NumberP58

**600 W**
The P58 TRIDUCER® Multisensor is Airmar’s most affordable, dual-frequency, 50/200 kHz, transom-mount design. It combines depth, speed, and temperature functions in one housing. Few parts make installation simple, and its compact size is attractive to small-boat owners. Our square-blade paddlewheel has good linearity and is quite accurate throughout the speed range.

products.name: P65 Smart™ Transom Mount
products.descriptor: Compact 200 W NMEA 2000 transom-mount depth/temperature Smart transducer

evidence.snippet:
P65 Smart™ Transom Mount
------------------------
Part NumberP65

The P65 is a compact Smart® transducer featuring depth and temperature. Perfect for interfacing to the NMEA 2000 network, gauges and displays, the small size and easy install makes it the logical choice for pontoon and small run-abouts.

products.name: P66 Multisensor/CW Transom Mount
products.descriptor: Dual-frequency 50/200 kHz 600 W hydrodynamic transom-mount depth/temperature multisensor

evidence.snippet:
P66 Multisensor/CW Transom Mount
--------------------------------
Part NumberP66

**600 W**
The P66 Multisensor combines depth, and temperature functions in one housing. And it features our 50/200 kHz, dual-frequency, ceramic element. This hydrodynamic housing with its rounded nose reduces the turbulence under the transducer’s acoustic face for clear display images. It is Airmar’s best transom mount for boats up to 8 m (25') long.

Ultrasonic Wind Measurement GNSS Motion Sensing Bluetooth® + CAST™ Expanded Protocols
